title: CASE query crashes database
poc: SELECT CASE WHEN foo = 'foo1' THEN 1 WHEN foo = 'foo2' THEN 2 END AS result_name FROM test_table GROUP BY result_name;
key_bug_features: SELECT CASE statement with GROUP BY clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (foo varchar(250), bar int, baz date);
INSERT INTO test_table (foo, bar, baz) VALUES ('foo1', 1, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO test_table (foo, bar, baz) VALUES ('foo2', 2, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (foo, bar, baz) VALUES ('foo3', NULL, '2023-01-03');
SELECT CASE WHEN bar IS NULL THEN 'No Value' WHEN foo = 'foo1' THEN 1 WHEN foo = 'foo2' THEN 2 END AS result_name FROM test_table GROUP BY result_name;
